title: Remediation Acceleration Plan update, July 2025
body: "The Remediation Acceleration Plan (RAP), published on 2 December 2024, set out the government’s plans to accelerate the remediation of residential buildings with unsafe cladding in England, and improve residents’ experience. This update reports on progress towards achieving the objectives set out in the RAP and outlines additional measures to help overcome the barriers to remediation. "
